post.summary: Set membership card tier and period

get.description: Get card information by id (serial number)

post.description:
Retrieve a bundle of app installation credentials using any one of them.

For example, on a service webhook or at the application service level,
you may only have the merchant ID and need to obtain the service API token.

Perform an accrual action on a purchase.

A customer's phone number, email, or card serial number is required to find or register a loyalty card.
Revert a previously performed accrual action using the transaction ID.

countVisits.description: This field is always empty if a list of cards is requested.

totalRewardsRedeemed.description: This field is always empty if a list of cards is requested.

totalRewardsEarned.description: This field is always empty if a list of cards is requested.

totalStampsEarnedByReferral.description: This field is always empty if a list of cards is requested.

totalPointsEarnedByReferral.description: This field is always empty if a list of cards is requested.

lastRewardRedeemedAt.description: This field is always empty if a list of cards is requested.

lastRewardEarnedAt.description: This field is always empty if a list of cards is requested.

lastStampEarnedAt.description: This field is always empty if a list of cards is requested.

customFields.title: Send customFields from template. Сan exclude customField with required: false and customField with type phone, email, FName, SName, DateOfBirth if they are filled in customer.

names.description:
Optional credential names to return.
If not specified, all merchant credentials are returned.

amount.description: Total amount of the check in cents.

checkAmount.description: Total amount of the check in cents

accruedValue.description: Actually accrued amount in cents. May be 0 in specific cases

id.description: Inventory item unique ID. Need to work an accrual rule with specific SKU.

groupId.description: Group ID of inventory item. Need to work an accrual rule with specific SKU group.

quantity.description: Quantity of items. Should be positive.
